headerDisplay: Homebridge plugin for Oasis Mini kinetic sand table. Control your sand table via Siri and HomeKit.

name.title: Name
name.description: The name that will appear in HomeKit for this device.

serial.title: Device Serial Number
serial.description: The serial number of your Oasis Mini device. Found on the bottom of the device or in the Oasis app under Settings.

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.description: How often to poll the device for status updates (backup to real-time MQTT).
